questions.question: Choose the correct indirect speech: He said, 'I am tired.'?

questions.question: The plant shed its leaves. Possessive pronoun?
Now we shall discuss ______ our future prospects.
We are going to bake the bread. (Passive)
options: The bread is going to be baked.
The bread was going to be baked.
questions.answer: The bread is going to be baked.

questions.question: The Principal ______ to speak to you.
Mary opened the door. (Passive)
options: The door was opened by Mary.
questions.answer: The door was opened by Mary.

questions.question: He didn't get ______ job he applied for.

options: Joshua told mom that I had been there.
Joshua told mom that he has been there.
Joshua told mom that he had been here.
Joshua told mom that he had been there.
questions.answer: Joshua told mom that he had been there.
